# The Untold Stories

> An AI-powered text adventure engine. Players create characters, pick genres, and play simulation-driven RPG campaigns where the world and NPCs run independently of the player.

The Untold Stories is a browser-based, simulation-first text RPG. Adventures are generated and narrated by AI, with persistent campaigns, companion NPCs, dynamic genres, and a living world that reacts to player choices.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Create a new adventure — pick a genre, character, and scenario.
- [Campaigns](/campaigns): Browse, load, and manage saved campaigns.
- [New Campaign](/campaigns/new): Start a fresh campaign with the adventure creator.
- [Play](/play): Resume the active campaign.
- [Achievements](/achievements): View unlocked achievements and lifetime stats.

## Optional

- [Profile](/profile): User account, cloud sync, and synced campaigns (requires sign-in).
